topic: identifying points on the coordinate plane
latex: In the coordinate plane below, which point could have coordinates $(3, -2)$?
keep_mc_reason: The question asks 'which point' and requires students to select from labeled points on a diagram; removing choices would break the question.
diagram_notes: A coordinate plane with x and y axes, origin labeled O. Four points are plotted: Point B is in quadrant II (negative x, positive y), Point A is in quadrant I (positive x, positive y), Point C is in quadrant III (negative x, negative y), and Point D is in quadrant IV (positive x, negative y). The axes have arrows indicating positive directions.
